CONTENT.Club career: Wiśniewski comes from the Górnik Zabrze youth ranks.On 27 May 2022, Wiśniewski signed a contract with Serie B club Venezia in Italy for three seasons with an option for a fourth.On 26 January 2023, Wiśniewski moved to Spezia in Serie A on a four-and-a-half-year contract.
CONTENT.International career: Wiśniewski was called up for the senior Polish senior squad for matches against Germany and against Moldova (UEFA Euro 2024 qualifying, respectively on 16 and 20 June 2023.

SUMMARY: Przemysław Wiśniewski (born 27 July 1998) is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Italian Serie B club Spezia.
